phrases.en: Dan invites a few close friends over for the evening.
phrases.zh: 丹邀请几位好友晚上过来。

phrases.en: He tidies up the living room and clears the big table.
phrases.zh: 他收拾客厅，把大桌子清理干净。

phrases.en: He sets out some snacks and cold drinks.
phrases.zh: 他摆出一些零食和冷饮。

phrases.en: His friends arrive happily and hang up their coats.
phrases.zh: 他的朋友们高兴地到了，挂好外套。

phrases.en: Dan opens the box and sets up the board game.
He carefully spreads the board out in the middle.
phrases.zh: 他小心地把游戏板铺在中间。

phrases.en: He shuffles the deck and deals the cards to everyone.
phrases.zh: 他洗好牌，把卡牌发给每个人。

phrases.en: They read the rules aloud before they start.
phrases.zh: 开始前，他们大声念出规则。

phrases.en: The players take turns and roll the dice.
Dan keeps score with a pencil on a small notepad.
phrases.zh: 丹用铅笔在小本子上记分。

phrases.en: Everyone laughs loudly during the close, exciting rounds.
phrases.zh: 在紧张刺激的回合里，大家都开怀大笑。

phrases.en: The friend with the most points finally wins the game.
phrases.zh: 得分最多的朋友最终赢得了比赛。

phrases.en: They pack up the pieces and put everything back in the box.
phrases.zh: 他们收起棋子，把所有东西放回盒子里。

phrases.en: Then, Dan thanks his friends and says goodnight.
phrases.zh: 然后，丹感谢朋友们，道了晚安。
